title: Launch decision register
description: Machine-readable register of every launch-critical decision whose ambiguity would damage the first-beta claim if it survived the milestone-zero review cycle. Companion to the rolling decision index (schemas/governance/decision_index.schema.json, artifacts/governance/decision_index.yaml): the launch register is the product- and sponsor-scope projection, the decision index is the architecture-ADR projection. Rows in this register carry a stable LR-NNNN id, a product-scope decision statement, a freeze-by milestone and date, an owner forum and backup-owner posture, a narrower default that auto-applies if the row is still open on applies_on, a public-claim posture the product may use while the row is open, at least one linked assumption or dependency row, a list of affected artifacts, a decision vehicle class (ADR/RFC, sponsor scope decision, release decision, or narrowing-only governance note), and an append-only decision history. Architecture-pack and scorecard artifacts cite decision_id values from this register (LR-NNNN) and from the rolling decision index (D-NNNN) without inventing parallel status fields.

schema_version.description: Document schema version. Increment on breaking field changes; additive-minor changes (new optional property, new enum value, new sub-record) do not bump this constant.

source_specs.description: Repository-relative paths to the source-of-truth specs whose launch-critical decisions this register projects.

assumptions.description: Launch-scope assumption rows referenced from decision entries via linked_assumptions. Distinct from the rolling decision index assumption list (A-NNNN): launch-register assumptions use LA-NNNN ids and live here.

dependencies.description: Launch-scope dependency rows referenced from decision entries via linked_dependencies. Distinct from the rolling decision index dependency list (DEP-NNNN): launch-register dependencies use LDEP-NNNN ids and live here.

decisions.description: Launch decision rows. Each row represents one decision that MUST be closed, deferred, narrowed, or superseded before the milestone-zero review cycle closes; tooling enforces the narrower-default posture automatically on applies_on.

decision_kind.description: Shape of the decision. Used by report projection to group rows and route reviewer guidance.

decision_vehicle_class.description: How the decision closes. adr_or_rfc: closes by landing an ADR or an RFC that converts to an ADR. sponsor_scope_decision: closes by an explicit sponsor / product-scope review ruling recorded in a scope-review packet; ADR is not required. release_decision: closes by a release-council ruling recorded in the release evidence lane. narrowing_only_governance_note: does not require a decision record; if the row is still open on applies_on the narrower default fires and the row moves to narrowed_by_default.

current_state.description: Mirrors the rolling decision-index status vocabulary so consumers need one state enum across both registers.

narrower_default_posture.description: Matches schemas/governance/decision_index.schema.json#/$defs/default_if_unresolved.posture. narrow: reduce the committed scope; defer: push to a later milestone with a restated freeze; freeze_lane: block dependent work; rebaseline: trigger milestone rebaseline review.

description.description: Concrete statement of what narrowing / deferral / freeze / rebaseline means for this specific row. A freeze report must be able to print this sentence as the explicit narrow-scope outcome for an unresolved row past its deadline.

requires_approval_from.description: Forum ids whose approval is needed to override the default posture. Empty means the default fires automatically on applies_on without further approval.

allowed_posture.description: What product is allowed to claim publicly while this row is still open. Must be expressed as a narrow statement, never as an open-ended promise.

forbidden_claim_surfaces.description: Named public-claim surfaces that may NOT reference this decision's wider scope until the row closes. Resolves against artifacts/governance/claim_manifest_seed.yaml entries where applicable.

decision_id.description: Stable launch-register id. Not reusable when a row is superseded; mint a new id and point superseded_by at it.

decision_statement.description: One-sentence statement of the launch-gate decision. Reads as what MUST be frozen, not as a rationale.

target_milestone.description: Milestone slug this decision belongs to. MUST match the slug convention used in artifacts/governance/scorecards/.

freeze_by_milestone.description: Milestone slug by which the decision MUST be closed, deferred, or narrowed. May equal target_milestone.

freeze_by_date.description: Calendar freeze. On this date, if current_state is still open or deciding, narrower_default applies automatically unless requires_approval_from is non-empty.

decision_deadline.description: Soft deadline. Forum target for closing the decision before the freeze. Earlier than or equal to freeze_by_date.

applies_on.description: Date the narrower_default posture applies automatically if the decision is still open. Normally equal to freeze_by_date.

backup_waiver.description: Waiver id from artifacts/governance/ownership_matrix.yaml#waivers. Required when backup_owner is null.

evidence_owner.description: Named evidence owner for the narrowing note, scope-review packet, release-decision record, or ADR that closes or justifies this decision.

linked_assumptions.description: Launch-register assumption ids this row depends on.

linked_dependencies.description: Launch-register dependency ids this row depends on.

linked_decision_index_rows.description: Decision ids from artifacts/governance/decision_index.yaml whose closure resolves part or all of this launch row.

linked_decision_index_assumptions.description: Assumption ids from artifacts/governance/decision_index.yaml this row depends on.

linked_decision_index_dependencies.description: Dependency ids from artifacts/governance/decision_index.yaml this row depends on.

affected_artifacts.description: Repo-relative paths or lane ids whose behaviour or contracts this decision will freeze, change, or narrow.

scorecard_lane_refs.description: Lane ids drawn from artifacts/governance/ownership_matrix.yaml#scorecard_lane_index. Scorecards cite this decision_id against the named lane instead of inventing a parallel status field.

architecture_pack_refs.description: Architecture-pack section ids this row is a prerequisite of. The pack cites the decision_id; it does not restate the row's state.

source_anchors.description: Pointers into source documents that motivate this decision.

superseded_by.description: Launch-register ids that supersede this row. Non-empty only when current_state is superseded.

decision_history.description: Append-only history. Never rewrite; add new entries.

allOf.description: backup_waiver MUST be set when backup_owner is null.
superseded_by MUST be non-empty when current_state is superseded.
Every row MUST link to at least one assumption or dependency (launch-register or rolling-index), so no row can sit without a traceable open premise.
affected_artifacts MUST be non-empty. A launch-critical row with no affected artifact is a validation failure.
When decision_vehicle_class is adr_or_rfc and current_state is decided, linked_adr MUST be populated.
